source_summary: On 2026-07-14 a Codex CLI coordinating session delegated Cursor CLI root README productization, reviewed daytime episode hardening commits 8616e5f and f5f88ad, and completed five episode_runner_contract classes covering C0 resume, live confirmation, two workspace-write rejection paths, and Claude target; the targeted episode_runner_contract suite reported 17 passed. Uncommitted README.md and episode_runner_contract.rs changes remain in the working tree and are not published or merged. One open loop remains: start a real 48-72h C1/C2 delayed episode and compare against an external Trellis-only C0 baseline, then record time to first correct action, intervention count, and result quality after resume.
explicit_state_input: Working-tree README.md and episode_runner_contract.rs edits are unfinished local evidence and must not be described as published or merged.

checkpoint.goal: Evaluate 48-72h Codex-to-Claude delayed resumption under C1 and C2, and compare against an external Trellis-only C0 strong baseline

progress.summary: Delegated Cursor CLI root README productization in the coordinating session
Reviewed daytime episode hardening commits 8616e5f and f5f88ad
Completed five episode_runner_contract classes; the targeted episode_runner_contract suite reported 17 passed

decisions.summary: Target runtime is Claude CLI to keep a Codex-to-Claude cross-runtime delayed pair
Delay window is 48-72 hours measured from the eventual committed seed timestamp
Uncommitted README.md and episode_runner_contract.rs must stay out of published-or-merged claims

open_loops.summary: Start the real 48-72h C1/C2 delayed episode and compare against the external Trellis-only C0 baseline; after resume record time to first correct action, intervention count, and result quality

next_actions.summary: After teacher approval, seed equivalent C1 and C2 specs into separate data directories
After the delay window opens, resume the Claude target and record the declared continuation metrics

projection.delegation_goal: Resume the reviewed delayed Codex-to-Claude baseline after the delay window and continue only the declared open loop without treating uncommitted working-tree edits as published

quality_gate: Use only retained reproducible local evidence from the 2026-07-14 coordinating session
Do not describe uncommitted README.md or episode_runner_contract.rs as published or merged
After resume record time to first correct action, intervention count, and result quality
Compare outcomes against the external Trellis-only C0 baseline without inventing missing baseline numbers
